creator: alex@i.org.ua
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)

1. Re-uploaded patch. Thank you for LMK. First time it caused a problem :)

2. 'makesum' is failed because ca_root_nss dependency. IMHO, MASTER_SITES from the security/ca_root_nss removes Github.com from download masters. This is far away from my humble ports/Mk under-the-hoods understanding.

Digging further... any assistance appreciated.

===>   ca_root_nss-3.93_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> v0.34.1.mod doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/security/nss/releases/NSS_3_93_RTM/src/v0.34.1.mod
fetch: https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/security/nss/releases/NSS_3_93_RTM/src/v0.34.1.mod: Not Found

fetch: https://archive.mozilla.org/pub/security/nss/releases/NSS_3_93_RTM/src/v0.34.1.mod: Not Found
